title.en: The God of the Tooth Realm shouted.

content.en:
"You ......"

The gods of the Ziya Realm were full of fear, but they didn't expect Ye Tian to follow him back to the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization.

Escape!

In a short period of time, he had already shuttled through the boundary superdimensional barrier twice in a row, fought with Ye Tian again, and was also severely injured, the superdimensional bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon had gradually dried up, and now he could no longer urge the Black Scale Domain Dragon bloodline to leave here.

But he also knew that he couldn't escape, so he could only hope that the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization would stop him.

"He's the enemy, kill him!"

The God of the Tooth Realm shouted.

But suddenly.

Ye Tian's True Ming Light Domain suppressed the Ziya Realm God, making its speed extremely slow.

Seeing this, the god of the Ziya Realm forcibly burned the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, even if the body was abolished, it was better than falling.

But no matter what he did, it was in vain.

Poof! "Seven-Four-Seven"

The body of the god of the Ziya Realm was pierced, and the extradimensional power of the Consummation Realm strangled all the upgrades of his body.

In the next second, the God of the Ziya Realm completely fell.

And at this time, the other peak realm gods still didn't make a move.

They are not stupid, how dare they do it to Ye Tian!

"Spare your life!"

They knelt down and bowed one after another, begging Ye Tian to forgive them.

They did not dare to flee because they could not flee at all.

Even the gods of the half-step extradimensional realm have fallen, where can they escape!

"This is the Ice Ghost Headquarters?"

Ye Tian's indifferent voice came.

"Yes!"

Many peak realm gods responded one after another.

Ye Tian's will covered the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization, and found that the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization was actually located in a fragment of a shattered extradimensional realm.

This extradimensional realm should have been shattered a long time ago, there are many fragments here, but there are few resources, and one of the huge fragments is occupied by the Ice Ghost Organization, where the headquarters is built, and the extradimensional formation is arranged, and it is hidden.

It is almost impossible for the Extradimensional Realm and the Half-Step Extradimensional Realm to come here, and it is not easy for the Peak Realm Gods to discover here.

Therefore, the forces of the outside world still do not know where the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization is.

But now, this place has been discovered by Ye Tian.

Of course, it was also the Ziya Realm God who wanted to escape back to the Ice Ghost Organization, so Ye Tian hitchhiked over, otherwise, he would not have been able to come here at all.

He is not like the god of the Ziya Realm, he has the ability to shuttle through the extradimensional barrier of the border.

No matter how powerful he is, he can't forcibly break the boundary extradimensional barrier, let alone cross multiple territories and enter here.

Ye Tian didn't destroy these peak realm gods, and it was still useful for him to keep them.

After all, there are countless extradimensional eras in the Ice Ghost Organization, and it is still useful to keep such a force.

On the other side, the Ice Bee Realm God was also killed by him.

At this point, the big leader and the three leaders of the Ice Ghost Organization have fallen.

"Which of you is currently the tallest place?"

Ye Tian asked again.

At this time, the second leader of the Ice Ghost Organization came out.

"My lord, I am the second leader of the Ice Ghost Organization, the God of the Gathering Star Realm!"

He knew very well that the gods of the Ziya Realm had fallen, and the Great Leader Ice Bee Realm God had also definitely fallen, and if he was disobedient, he would also fall.

So, he took the initiative to admit his identity.

"Give me all the information on the Ice Ghost Organization's headquarters!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The God of the Gathering Star Realm responded.

Subsequently, a large amount of intelligence information was extracted by the Gathering Star Realm God, stored in a light cluster, and handed over to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian absorbed the light cluster and quickly learned about the situation at the headquarters of the Ice Ghost Organization.

"The Ice Ghost Organization is really extraordinary!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although there are no strong people in this force, there are many peak realm gods, there are about more than 20,000 peak realm gods, but there are only more than 3,000 peak realm gods in the headquarters, and the other peak realm gods are in various branches, and they are not allowed to enter the headquarters.

In addition, the Ice Ghost Organization has also mastered a number of relics, some of which are even half-step extradimensional realms or even suspected extradimensional realm relics.

For example, the super-dimensional formation that can break through the boundary extra-dimensional barrier, the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array, comes from a place that is suspected to be a super-dimensional realm ruin, and the transformation method of the Black Scale Domain Dragon fused by the gods of the Ziya Realm also comes from a ruin.

At present, these ruins have not been fully explored, after all, they are also afraid of falling, and some ruins are even in danger of entering the half-step extradimensional realm, where do they dare to enter!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took over all the formations of the Ice Ghost Organization, and let these peak realm gods not be allowed to leave, and left a mark of extradimensional power on each peak realm god...

If anyone dares to disobey his orders, he can directly perceive it, and he can project it to descend and bombard the other party.

......

"According to the information I know, the territory where the Ice Ghost Organization is located is the Seven Thousand One Hundred and Twenty-Six Territory, this territory used to be quite good, with two extradimensional realms, but now one extradimensional realm is broken, and the other is also in the origin of collapse at any time, there are no peak realm gods, and most of the powerhouses have already fled from other realms. "

"Such a territory, the Six-Winged Family's extradimensional realm will not come, there is no condition to cultivate the Extradimensional Origin Bead here, it is indeed suitable for the Ice Ghost Organization as a headquarters, and in the future, a group of Terrans can also be moved here as one of the reserve bases of the Terrans. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He took out the items left behind by the God of the Ziya Realm, and wanted to find out the transformation method of the superdimensional bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon from inside.

The God of the Gathering Star Realm gave him all the information, and naturally it also included the transformation method of the Black Scale Domain Dragon's superdimensional bloodline.

Naturally, he doesn't look down on the super-dimensional bloodline, and it is impossible to fuse the super-dimensional bloodline, such a powerful super-dimensional bloodline can fuse some peak realm gods for the human race when the time comes.

If the Terrans had more half-step extradimensional realms that fused with the blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, then it would be easy to shuttle to other realms.

Such a half-step extradimensional realm is completely 1.8, and a few more can be cultivated.

"Hey, I really found it!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

This is a black stone tablet, and when Ye Tian's will enters it, he obtains a method of transforming the flesh with a superdimensional bloodline.

【The Law of Domain Dragon Transformation】

This transformation method is not only suitable for the Black Scale Domain Dragon Super Dimensional Bloodline, but also for the Golden Scale Domain Dragon Super Dimensional Bloodline.

According to the above, the Golden Scale Dragon is the most suitable.

However, the Golden Scale Domain Dragon is too powerful, it was born into a half-step extradimensional realm, and it can rival the extradimensional realm when it is an adult, and the gods of the Ziya Realm don't dare to fight the idea of the Golden Scale Domain Dragon at all, and even the ordinary extradimensional realm does not dare to fight the idea of the Golden Scale Domain Dragon!

"With the Domain Dragon Transformation Method, you can buy some Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood from the Six Thousand Territory later!"

Ye Tian decided.
